top3_zh: **高置信度**：Opus 4.7 今天发布，新版 tokenizer 对输入的 token 计费提高了 1.0–1.35 倍，评论区已在公开迁移至 Codex——编程 agent 的切换成本在这一周彻底坍塌。
**外部发现**：本周 Google 搜索"mythos"上涨 +130%、"claude mythos"上涨 +80%——Anthropic 保留容量研究层级的买家意图在产品广泛可用之前已经泄漏到公开搜索中。
**双重验证**："Ask HN: Who is using OpenClaw?" 在 8 小时内获得 320 票和 365 条评论，同时 Google Trends 显示"openclaw"查询在 3 个月窗口出现爆发，但在 7 天窗口中缺席——质疑声浪现在已经比实际使用声量更大。
top3_en: **High-confidence**: Opus 4.7 launched today with a new tokenizer that charges 1.0–1.35× more tokens per input, and the comment section is openly migrating to Codex — the coding-agent switching cost just collapsed.

**External discovery**: Google search for "mythos" is up +130% and "claude mythos" up +80% this week — buyer intent for Anthropic's reserved-capacity tier is leaking before the product is broadly available.

**Dual-validated**: "Ask HN: Who is using OpenClaw?" hit 320 votes and 365 comments in 8 hours, while Google Trends shows "openclaw" queries breaking out on the 3-month window but absent from the 7-day window — the skeptic conversation is now louder than the usage.
intro_zh: 今天所有人都在用编程 benchmark 对比 [Opus 4.7](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-7) 和 [Qwen3.6-35B-A3B](https://qwen.ai/blog?id=qwen3.6-35b-a3b)——这是在看错评分表。更值得关注的故事是：一位开发者睡觉期间，Firebase + Gemini 账单在不到 13 小时内飙到了 €54,000，而没有人在做那个能提前拦住它的"看门狗"。
intro_en: Everyone's grading [Opus 4.7](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-7) against [Qwen3.6-35B-A3B](https://qwen.ai/blog?id=qwen3.6-35b-a3b) on coding benchmarks today — wrong scoreboard. The sharper story is a €54,000 Firebase + Gemini bill that appeared in under 13 hours while a developer slept, and nobody's building the watchdog that catches it.
